actions.label: after-login
actions.text:
STEP 2 OF 4

Fill in My Scientology

Theta-Space is private membership. These fields are recommended and stay private unless you later choose otherwise. You can skip this page and finish it later.

CLASSIFICATION
LAST 6 OF IAS MEMBERSHIP NUMBER, OPTIONAL
CURRENT ORG RECEIVING SERVICES
LAST SERVICE
TRAINING LEVEL
PROCESSING / RUNDOWN
NOTES, OPTIONAL

actions.text:
STEP 3 OF 4

Good-standing attestation

This confirmation is required before Terms of Service. If you cannot attest this, the application ends here.

I attest that I am currently active as a Scientologist and in good standing with the Church of Scientology.

No, I cannot attest this
